headline: Booking, Expedia face margin pressure from AI agents, Bernstein says
summary: Investing.com – The online travel agency (OTA) sector is facing a "paradigm shift" that could prove more disruptive than the entry of Google a decade ago, according to a report from Bernstein. Analysts warn that while large platforms like Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:BKNG) and Expedia Inc (NASDAQ:EXPE) successfully navigated previous challenges, the rise of generative AI threatens to compress margins and erode the "supply moat" that has long protected these industry giants.
